title: Year field validation could reject negative values
evidence: src/db.ts:23 defines year as INTEGER without constraint; src/app.ts:16,64 accepts any number including negatives
suggestion: Add validation to reject negative or unrealistic years (e.g., < 0 or > current year + 10)

title: Database errors not explicitly handled
evidence: src/app.ts:104-107 has generic error handler that catches all errors without distinguishing database errors
suggestion: Add specific handling for database constraint violations and provide more informative error messages

title: File-based persistence not tested
evidence: src/app.test.ts uses :memory: SQLite for all tests; file-based persistence in src/index.ts is not exercised
suggestion: Consider adding integration tests with file-based database to verify persistence works end-to-end
